fields.title: Getting the Climber badge
fields.content: Im looking at the requirements for the climber badge and I need help understanding the different ropes used, can anyone help with material to use.

fields.title: Next Troop meeting
fields.content: Hi all I was wondering what I should be bringing to the next troop meeting I understand we're backwards cooking, would I need to bring any specific items.
fields.excerpt: Anything specific that should be brought to next weeks meeting
